tags.name: Annie St Plaza
tags.note: Annie Street Plaza is a new pedestrian space in downtown San Francisco that opened in November 2014. New seating, greenery, and lighting - along with programmed events and activities - create a special new place in the heart of a thriving neighborhood.

tags.description: Maritime Plaza (rooftop park owned by the city)
